issue.body:
Add a horizontal-projection pass on cropped word images to estimate true x-height per word, as a refinement to the current bbox-height-based sidenote detector.

Bbox heights are coarse for OCR output that bundles ascenders/descenders inconsistently; a projection pass on the cropped image gives a more stable size signal. The PLAN sketched this but it is worth doing only if a fixture shows bbox-height alone misclassifying.

Pre-req: produce a fixture demonstrating bbox-height misclassification before implementing.

Source: docs/ROADMAP.md (Glyph-size analysis - Image-projection refinement).
Spec: docs/specs/03-reorganize-pipeline.md

## Acceptance
- [ ] Reproduce a misclassification case where bbox-height alone fails
- [ ] Implement projection-based x-height helper (single-image input, no GPU dependency)
- [ ] Plumb as opt-in alongside `max_height_ratio` (do not change default)
- [ ] Fixture diff shows the projection pass corrects the case without regressing others

nodes.body: Triage decision: approved + needs-spec. Spec child issue: #47. Run `/spec-from-issue 47` to produce the design spec.

issue.title: Sidenote detection: image-projection-based x-height refinement

## Triage decision

Approved as needing-spec during the 2026-05-11 backlog triage sweep — this feature requires design work before implementation; not a one-PR tracking-style chore.

Inherits effort/model labels from the parent feature-request.

issue.body:
Filed from the pd-book-tools deep code/security review.

Report: `docs/research/2026-05-22-deep-code-security-review.md`
Finding: #4

Moved from mistakenly filed meta issue: ConcaveTrillion/ocr-container-meta#297

Evidence:

- `pd_book_tools/layout/registry.py:242`
- `pd_book_tools/layout/registry.py:245`

`register_detector()` only evicts cached entries when replacing a previous user factory. If `get_detector("custom-x", on_error="log_and_null")` ran before registration, a fallback can remain cached after the first real registration.

Impact:

- Newly registered detectors may never be used for that key.

Remediation:

- Always evict cached entries for `key` during registration, regardless of whether a previous factory existed.

---
This issue was filed from a read-only review. Confirm behavior with a focused failing test before implementation where practical.
issue.title: pd-book-tools: registering a detector after fallback can leave stale `NullDetector`
